text: The atmosphere here feels lively and curious, as I stand before a space dedicated to Research and Development. The energy is both creative and contemplative, and I sense the presence of innovation around me. For a philosopher, being surrounded by visual and textual explorations of human and machine collaboration fills me with a quiet excitement—a desire to question how technology shapes existence. There’s an undercurrent of anticipation, as if each object and idea in this room could be an entry point to deeper understanding.
